none: 500 kV transmission line, Delmarva Power and Light, Delaware River, permit (DE,NJ) : environmental impact statement.

The proposal involves constructing a 500 kV aerial transmission line across the Delaware River, connecting Deemers Beach in Delaware to Kelly Point in New Jersey. The project aims to enhance electrical power reliability and efficiency in the region, linking several nuclear and generating stations. However, it has faced significant opposition due to environmental concerns, potential impacts on local wildlife, and aesthetic intrusions on historical sites. The community is divided, with some advocating for alternative routes to minimize environmental and historical impacts, while others emphasize the urgent need for improved power infrastructure.

The project aims to enhance electrical power reliability and efficiency in the region, linking several nuclear and generating stations. However, it has faced significant opposition due to environmental concerns, potential impacts on local wildlife, and aesthetic intrusions on historical sites. The community is divided, with some advocating for alternative routes to minimize environmental and historical impacts, while others emphasize the urgent need for improved power infrastructure.
Deemers Beach, Delaware to Kelly Point, New Jersey
Civic League for New Castle County

The 500 kV transmission line project was proposed to improve electrical power reliability and efficiency in the region, connecting key energy sources. However, it faced significant opposition from local communities and environmental groups concerned about its impact on wildlife and historical sites. The project sparked a debate between those prioritizing infrastructure needs and those advocating for environmental protection and alternative routes.
United States. Army. Corps of Engineers

"The proposed project has encountered sustained, vigorous community opposition due to its unduly roundabout routing and its severe encroachment on our scenic historic riverfront." — Mrs. Clare A. Stewart, President, Civic League for New Castle County

"The Society aim is to keep Pea Patch Island (Fort Delaware State Park) and its environment in its natural state insofar as possible. This includes the impressive view from the top of the three-story Fort, which is one of its attractions." — Gordon D. Patterson, Fort Delaware Society
